description: Design and Technologies concept progression map — Knowledge and Understanding strand, Foundation to Years 9-10. Organised by ACARA technologies contexts with normalised strand keys for visualisation.
subject: Design and Technologies

standards.title: Designed products and environments
standards.description: explore how familiar products, services and environments are designed by people
standards.y_goal: Students explore how familiar products, services and environments are designed by people.

standards.title: Designed solutions for needs
standards.description: identify how familiar products, services and environments are designed and produced by people to meet personal or local community needs and sustainability
standards.y_goal: Students identify how familiar products, services and environments are designed and produced to meet personal or local community needs and sustainability.

standards.title: Materials affect movement
standards.description: explore how technologies including materials affect movement in products
standards.y_goal: Students explore how technologies, including materials, affect movement in products.

standards.title: Growing plants and animals
standards.description: explore how plants and animals are grown for food, clothing and shelter
standards.y_goal: Students explore how plants and animals are grown for food, clothing and shelter.

standards.title: Selecting and preparing food
standards.description: explore how food can be selected and prepared for healthy eating
standards.y_goal: Students explore how food can be selected and prepared for healthy eating.

standards.title: Design occupations and sustainability
standards.description: examine design and technologies occupations and factors including sustainability that impact on the design of products, services and environments to meet community needs
standards.y_goal: Students examine design and technologies occupations and factors, including sustainability, that impact the design of products, services and environments to meet community needs.

standards.title: Forces and material function
standards.description: describe how forces and the properties of materials affect function in a product or system
standards.y_goal: Students describe how forces and the properties of materials affect function in a product or system.

standards.title: Ways of producing food and fibre
standards.description: describe the ways of producing food and fibre
standards.y_goal: Students describe the ways food and fibre are produced.

standards.title: Healthy food preparation choices
standards.description: describe the ways food can be selected and prepared for healthy eating
standards.y_goal: Students describe the ways food can be selected and prepared for healthy eating.

standards.title: Competing factors in design
standards.description: explain how people in design and technologies occupations consider competing factors including sustainability in the design of products, services and environments
standards.y_goal: Students explain how people in design and technologies occupations consider competing factors, including sustainability, in the design of products, services and environments.

standards.title: Electrical energy transformations
standards.description: explain how electrical energy can be transformed into movement, sound or light in a product or system
standards.y_goal: Students explain how electrical energy can be transformed into movement, sound or light in a product or system.

standards.title: Managed food and fibre production
standards.description: explain how and why food and fibre are produced in managed environments
standards.y_goal: Students explain how and why food and fibre are produced in managed environments.

standards.title: Food characteristics and preparation
standards.description: explain how the characteristics of foods influence selection and preparation for healthy eating
standards.y_goal: Students explain how the characteristics of foods influence selection and preparation for healthy eating.

standards.title: Properties affect material use
standards.description: explain how characteristics and properties of materials, systems, components, tools and equipment affect their use when producing designed solutions
standards.y_goal: Students explain how characteristics and properties of materials, systems, components, tools and equipment affect their use when producing designed solutions.

standards.title: Ethics and sustainability in design
standards.description: analyse how people in design and technologies occupations consider ethical and sustainability factors to design and produce products, services and environments
standards.y_goal: Students analyse how people in design and technologies occupations consider ethical and sustainability factors to design and produce products, services and environments.

standards.title: Innovation for preferred futures
standards.description: analyse the impact of innovation and the development of technologies on designed solutions for global preferred futures
standards.y_goal: Students analyse the impact of innovation and the development of technologies on designed solutions for global preferred futures.

standards.title: Force, motion and energy control
standards.description: analyse how force, motion and energy are used to manipulate and control engineered systems
standards.y_goal: Students analyse how force, motion and energy are used to manipulate and control engineered systems.

standards.title: Sustainable managed production
standards.description: analyse how food and fibre are produced in managed environments and how these can become sustainable
standards.y_goal: Students analyse how food and fibre are produced in managed environments and how these can become sustainable.

standards.title: Food properties and presentation
standards.description: analyse how properties of foods determine preparation and presentation techniques when designing solutions for healthy eating
standards.y_goal: Students analyse how properties of foods determine preparation and presentation techniques when designing solutions for healthy eating.

standards.title: Combining materials and systems
standards.description: analyse how characteristics and properties of materials, systems, components, tools and equipment can be combined to create designed solutions
standards.y_goal: Students analyse how characteristics and properties of materials, systems, components, tools and equipment can be combined to create designed solutions.

standards.title: Innovating with ethics and security
standards.description: analyse how people in design and technologies occupations consider ethical, security and sustainability factors to innovate and improve products, services and environments
standards.y_goal: Students analyse how people in design and technologies occupations consider ethical, security and sustainability factors to innovate and improve products, services and environments.

standards.title: Enterprise and emerging technologies
standards.description: analyse the impact of innovation, enterprise and emerging technologies on designed solutions for global preferred futures
standards.y_goal: Students analyse the impact of innovation, enterprise and emerging technologies on designed solutions for global preferred futures.

standards.title: Judging engineered systems
standards.description: analyse and make judgements on how the characteristics and properties of materials are combined with force, motion and energy to control engineered systems
standards.y_goal: Students analyse and make judgements about how the characteristics and properties of materials are combined with force, motion and energy to control engineered systems.

standards.title: Food and fibre enterprises
standards.description: analyse and make judgements on the ethical, secure and sustainable production and marketing of food and fibre enterprises
standards.y_goal: Students analyse and make judgements about the ethical, secure and sustainable production and marketing of food and fibre enterprises.

standards.title: Sensory and functional food properties
standards.description: analyse and make judgements on how the sensory and functional properties of food influence the design and preparation of sustainable food solutions for healthy eating
standards.y_goal: Students analyse and make judgements about how the sensory and functional properties of food influence the design and preparation of sustainable food solutions for healthy eating.

standards.title: Judging material combinations
standards.description: analyse and make judgements on how characteristics and properties of materials, systems, components, tools and equipment can be combined to create designed solutions
standards.y_goal: Students analyse and make judgements about how characteristics and properties of materials, systems, components, tools and equipment can be combined to create designed solutions.

progression_threads.description: Concept dependency trees for Design and Technologies Knowledge and Understanding, organised by technologies context. Earlier band standards are roots; children represent the next conceptual step.
